message:
test: add cache perf/log tests (xf-pkc)

- Add perf smoke test for cache hit vs cold load timing
- Add large embedding set test (5000 embeddings)
- Add loaded_now flag semantics test with thread safety
- Fix clippy must_use warning on search_top_k_parallel
